_comment: Colophon's own identity record. Every theme generated from Colophon carries a colophon.json like this, but with is_core=false; the CLI reads it to know the theme's namespace/slug/version (re-injected into core files on every sync) and which core paths the theme has deliberately overridden. Colophon's own record sets is_core=true so the CLI never tries to sync Colophon onto itself.
name: Colophon
